children.name: headline
children.text: We spent all our money on product development

corrections.problem: The background is solid white, while the reference uses a dark background with a white card element.
corrections.fix: Change background color to #1a1a1a and add a white card element with rounded corners behind the main text and product image placeholder.

corrections.problem: The text 'We spent all our money on product development' is positioned in the top left corner, but in the reference it is centered inside a white card.
corrections.fix: Move the headline text to be centered horizontally and vertically within the white card element, and set the text color to #1a1a1a.

corrections.problem: The text '(so we couldn't pay our designers)' is positioned below the main headline in the top left, but in the reference it is part of the white card content.
corrections.fix: Move the subheadline text to be positioned below the main headline within the white card element, and ensure it remains in #1a1a1a color.

corrections.problem: The 'Please buy our Creatine' text is positioned in the bottom left corner, but in the reference it is a prominent call-to-action element below the white card.
corrections.fix: Move the CTA text to be centered horizontally below the white card element, set the text color to #1a1a1a, and ensure proper spacing from the card above.

corrections.problem: The placeholder rectangle is positioned on the right side of the layout, but in the reference the product image is centered within the white card.
corrections.fix: Move the product image placeholder to be centered within the white card element, and scale it appropriately to fit within the card boundaries.
